title: onosma pygmaea
intro: Onosma pygmaea, also known as the dwarf onosma or pygmaea onosma, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae and is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and the Tibetan Plateau. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Onosma pygmaea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, Onosma pygmaea is often used to make extracts, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
